{# warm-elegant.html — Warm earthy tones with elegant serif typography #} {% extends "base_reveal.html" %} {% set style = { "reveal_theme": "simple", "font_heading": "'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif", "font_body": "'Source Sans Pro', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif", "heading_color": "#92400e", "text_color": "#451a03", "accent_color": "#b45309", "link_hover": "#92400e", "table_header_bg": "#92400e", "table_stripe_bg": "rgba(180,83,9,0.05)", "blockquote_bg": "rgba(180,83,9,0.06)", "code_bg": "#fef3c7" } %} {% set transition = "fade" %} {% block extra_css %} body { background: #fdf8f3; } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h1 { font-size: 2.2em; font-weight: 700; color: {{ style.heading_color }}; } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h3 { font-family: {{ style.font_body }}; font-weight: 400; color: {{ style.accent_color }}; } .reveal h2::after { content: ""; display: block; width: 60px; height: 3px; background: {{ style.accent_color }}; margin-top: 0.3em; } .reveal blockquote { border-left-width: 3px; font-family: {{ style.font_heading }}; } {% endblock %}
